title: RECHARGED GHOSTFREAK - ALIEN EVO RESOURCE PACK
description: Changes alien evolution's ghost freak to be the model from the upcoming Omnitrix:Recharged mod!
body:
literally just changes evos ghostfreak to be a new one i made for omnitrix:recharged


# DEPENDENCIES

*   [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
*   [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
*   [Kubejs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
*   [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
*   [Alien Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo)
*   [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
*   [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino)

### SPECIAL THANKS TO:

*   Mei for screenshots
*   Zaalhir for bugs ig
*   Amislayz for giving me a reason to make the model in the first place
